title: Angel Deaths
wikitext:
[]: Angel Deaths [HERE BE SPOILERS!!!]             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sat Aug 08, 2009 1:42 am I was wondering what people think about the way angels die in the rebuild series. Ever since 1.0, when most angels die they break down in the reddish LCL. I was wondering what people think about this. I think it is a nice touch to certain angel deaths. Sachiel's was my favorite because it went well with his explosion. With the others that did break down it was pretty cool too. Anyone else's thoughts?

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sat Aug 08, 2009 1:53 am Well, instead of having to fill gaping craters with water to make lakes, they somehow need to remove giant lakes of blood from their flooded, bloodied cities. Granted, it's amazing for dramatic effect, but I bet they'll need a whole lot of Windex.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Aug 08, 2009 3:46 am I like it, it does work for dramatic effect, I think. And it makes me wonder if Kaworu will die in some explosion of blood instead of (just? if even?) getting his popped off.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sat Aug 08, 2009 4:07 am Overall, I like it. I thought the way Sahaquiel(?) died was pretty speactacular...

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sat Aug 08, 2009 7:58 am LiLi wrote: Overall, I like it. I thought the way Sahaquiel(?) died was pretty speactacular...

[]:             Quote Post by Annihilator » Sat Aug 08, 2009 11:28 am I love it. Like they said, it adds a lot of dramatic effect. Its like, and reminds me of the way everyone popped into LCL in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Snowball » Sat Aug 08, 2009 11:35 am It also adds an interesting dynamic to the story. Whereas in the original series they could research the dead angels, now they have nothing to go with. The genetic similarity to humans might be a thing of the past along with the S2 engine.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Aug 08, 2009 11:48 am Snowball wrote: Whereas in the original series they could research the dead angels, now they have nothing to go with.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Aug 08, 2009 1:11 pm So what about Ramiel? I mean like, every time I tink of that guy the first thought that comes to mind is BOOM CUBE SHOT. But In rebuild all he did was bleed, then have a direct diarrhea attack on Nerv HQ ( yes windex ) How long did it take Nerv to "decompose" Ramiel?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Aug 08, 2009 2:54 pm BTW I wouldn't assum that the blood the Angels pop into is LCL, considering. It's probably liquid PWM lol mirite?

[]:             Quote Post by Rayshiest » Sat Aug 08, 2009 5:36 pm Sachiel was cool because he self destructed, Samshel left those rods in Unit 01's sides, Ramiel was just win with the head shot decomposition thingy and crying.. to be honest, Sahaquiel scared the SHIT out of me in the theatre, the way the river of blood knocked down buildings and destroyed power lines I thought it was coming to get me!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Aug 08, 2009 6:14 pm I think I brought this up somewhere else before, but Saha didn't have a rainbow.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sat Aug 08, 2009 6:20 pm So the big orange dude that wants to hug you is the only straight one. How ironic.

[]:             Quote Post by Maximilian » Sat Aug 08, 2009 9:18 pm I think there probably was one, we just never get a high enough viewpoint to see.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Aug 08, 2009 9:41 pm Maximilian wrote: I think there probably was one, we just never get a high enough viewpoint to see.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Aug 08, 2009 9:51 pm It SORTA looks like a rainbow here, but obviously it's not: I wonder if Saha will have a rainbow added in the DVD/Blu-Ray release.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sat Aug 08, 2009 9:54 pm Maybe when Bardiel was killed, the stuff coming out of the entry plug was the red LCL stuff instead of blood. So that makes sense if Unit-03 wasn't disintegrated.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Aug 08, 2009 10:59 pm Sammaeloo wrote: Maybe when Bardiel was killed, the stuff coming out of the entry plug was the red LCL stuff instead of blood.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun Aug 09, 2009 12:14 am Ornette wrote: I think I brought this up somewhere else before, but Saha didn't have a rainbow.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Aug 09, 2009 2:21 am Those tiny round things aren't rainbows, those were just plain white, not sure what they were.

Sachiel's was my favorite because it went well with his explosion. With the others that did break down it was pretty cool too. Anyone else's thoughts?
